_note: claude-superskills@2.0.8 does NOT ship bundles.json in its npm tarball (it lives only in the GitHub repo root), so the documented `--bundle` flow exits with 'bundles.json not found'. This file restores that capability. We also add a minimal `mckinsey` bundle so we can isolation-install ONLY the mckinsey-strategist skill. NOTE: the upstream `planning` bundle does NOT contain mckinsey-strategist; only `all` does.

mckinsey.name: McKinsey (isolated)
mckinsey.description: Just the mckinsey-strategist skill, for an isolated single-skill install.

planning.name: Planning
planning.description: Full planning and execution workflow (upstream definition; lacks mckinsey-strategist).

all.name: All Skills
all.description: Complete claude-superskills toolkit (the only upstream bundle that includes mckinsey-strategist).
